title: swarm-do telemetry outcome record
description: One row per pipeline phase completion (writer+review pair). v1 frozen 2026-04-23. Write path implemented in a later phase.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the outcome was recorded

writer_run_id.description: ULID of the agent-writer run that produced the implementation. null if not available.

review_run_id.description: ULID of the agent-review run that reviewed the implementation. null if not available.

verdict.description: Final review verdict for the phase

finding_count.description: Number of findings.jsonl rows linked to this outcome. null if not computed.

critical_finding_count.description: Number of critical-severity findings. null if not computed.

schema_ok.description: True = writer attests the row conforms to this schema.
